prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该校在黑龙江省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约209名、208名、241名、232名、230名，近五年位次在208–241区间窄幅波动，整体呈小幅后移趋 势；2025年基准位次约230名，近三年均值约234名，波动幅度约33名，显示该校在黑龙江省的生源质量高度稳定；该校在黑龙江省理科/物理类招生计划2021–20 25年均为20人，2026年增至21人，扩招1人（增幅5%）。扩招意味着竞争略有缓解，但扩招幅度较小，对位次的影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大 学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续位居第7名（Top7），属于国内顶尖高校梯队，对高分考生具有极强吸引力；2025 年高考周期内声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生逝世，曾为中国科大少年班做出重要贡献）；2026年高考周期内出现偏负面信号（教授因贪污助不合资格学生入读硕士课程被判囚20星 期），可能对报考心理产生轻微负面影响。抖音热度总排名第12位（高热），视频17条，综合热度约418万，显示该校在短视频平台关注度极高，有助于维持报考热度；第五轮学科评估中，中国科学技术大学拥有A+学科8个（数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程），A学科4个（材料科学与 工程、计算机科学与技术、管理科学与工程、工商管理），A-学科7个（统计学、力学、仪器科学与技术、动力工程及工程热物理、信息与通信工程、地质学、环境科学与工程） ，共19个A-及以上学科，学科实力极为突出，对优质生源吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等中科大核心招生 专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度吻合，有利于维持报考热度。黑龙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约16.7万人，按近年物理类占比约68.4%估算，物理类考生约11.4万人， 较2025年物理类11.74万人略有减少，竞争压力轻微缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次窄幅波动（近三年均值约234名）、2026年小幅扩 招（20→21人，+5%）、学校顶尖层次（软科第7）与强大优势学科对高分考生的持续吸引力、2026年声誉偏负面带来的轻微降温效应、抖音高热维持关注度、以及黑龙江省物理类 考生总数略有下降等因素，经有限修正后预测2026年最低录取位次约240名，较2025年230名小幅后移（位次数字增大），区间210–270名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（数学类+物理学类）
- 工科试验班（科技英才班）（计算机类+电子信息类）
- 量子信息科学（未来技术学院）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、自动化、人工智能等）
- 物理学类（物理学、应用物理学、天文学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（化学类+生物科学类+空间科学与技术）
- 理科试验班类（统计大数据与商业AI试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在240名左右，区间210–270名。建议位次在210名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（拔尖计划英才班、量子信息科学）；位次在220–250名的考生以二档专业为主（ 计算机类、数学类、电子信息类），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在250–270名的考生以三档专业为主（工科试验班、理科试验班），同时争取二档中位次要求相对较低的专业。该校学科 实力极为均衡，各档专业均有A+或A级学科支撑，报考价值很高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the university's minimum admission rankings in Heilongjiang Province for Science/Physics Category were approximately 209, 208, 241, 232, and 230 respectively. Over the past five years, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 208–241 range, showing a slight overall backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 230, with a three-year average of approximately 234 and a fluctuation range of about 33, indicating highly stable student source quality in Heilongjiang. The enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Heilongjiang was 20 students from 2021 to 2025, increasing to 21 in 2026, an expansion of 1 student (a 5% increase). The expansion means slightly reduced competition, but the increase is small, having limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it consistently ranked 7th (Top 7), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, strongly attracting high-scoring students. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was slightly positive (Li Zhengdao passed away, having made significant contributions to USTC's Special Class for the Gifted Young). In the 2026 cycle, a slightly negative signal emerged (a professor was sentenced to 20 weeks in prison for corruption in helping unqualified students enroll in master's programs), which may have a slight negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 12th overall (high heat), with 17 videos and a comprehensive popularity of about 4.18 million, indicating extremely high attention on short video platforms, helping maintain application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, USTC has 8 A+ disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering), 4 A disciplines (Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Management Science and Engineering, Business Administration), and 7 A- disciplines (Statistics, Mechanics, Instrument Science and Technology, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Information and Communication Engineering, Geology, Environmental Science and Engineering), totaling 19 A- and above disciplines, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that core USTC enrollment majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with the university's advantageous disciplines, helping maintain application enthusiasm. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000. Estimated by the recent Physics Category proportion of about 68.4%, Physics Category candidates are about 114,000, slightly decreasing from 117,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings (three-year average about 234), the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (20→21, +5%), the top-tier university level (Soft Science 7th) and strong advantageous disciplines' continuous attraction to high-scoring students, the slight cooling effect from the negative reputation in 2026, high Douyin heat maintaining attention, and the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Heilongjiang, after limited correction, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 240, slightly backward from 230 in 2025 (ranking number increases), with a range of 210–270.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Plan Science and Technology Elite Class) (Mathematics + Physics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science and Technology Elite Class) (Computer Science + Electronic Information)
- Quantum Information Science (School of Future Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Physics (Physics, Applied Physics, Astronomy, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Plan Science and Technology Elite Class) (Chemistry + Biological Sciences + Space Science and Technology)
- Science Experimental Class (Statistics Big Data and Business AI Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 240, range 210–270. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 210 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Top Talent Plan Elite Class, Quantum Information Science); candidates with rankings 220–250 mainly target Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Mathematics, Electronic Information), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings 250–270 mainly target Tier 3 majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Science Experimental Class), while also striving for relatively lower-ranking Tier 2 majors. The university's disciplinary strength is extremely balanced, with each tier of majors supported by A+ or A-level disciplines, offering high application value.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
